channel.title: SmartChoose - Product Feed
channel.description: SmartChoose affiliate product feed for Google Merchant Center

item.g:title: Amazon Echo Dot (5th Gen) | Smart speaker with vibrant sound, Motion Detection, Temperature Sensor, Alexa and Bluetooth| Black
item.g:description:
5th (Latest) Generation Echo Dot with Alexa-The best sounding Echo Dot yet! With deeper bass and clearer vocals than all previous generations.
Just ask Alexa to play music from Amazon Music, Spotify, Jio Saavn, Apple Music.(some apps may require subscription)
Voice control Alexa compatible smart appliances like lights, ACs, TVs, geysers. Extend the experience to non-smart appliances using smart plugs (to be purchased separately)
Automatically turn on light when you enter the room or switch on the AC when it gets hot using in-built motion detection and temperature sensor. Set these experiences using routines feature in Alexa app.
Manage your day better by just asking Alexa to set reminders, pay bills, add items to shopping list and much more. Alexa can speak English and Hindi.
Pause/resume music, snooze alarms, dismiss timers with just a tap.
Use as a standalone speaker or pair your phone to use it as a Bluetooth speaker.
Echo Dot comes with multiple privacy controls, including a mic off button.

item.g:title: Certified Refurbished Echo (4th Gen, 2020 release) | Premium sound powered by Dolby and Alexa (Black)
item.g:description:
A Certified Refurbished Echo device is refurbished, tested, and certified to look and work like new and comes with the same limited warranty as a new device.
4th (Latest) generation Echo with Alexa- Delivers premium sound (powered by Dolby) with clear highs, dynamic mids, and deep bass.
Just ask Alexa to play music from Amazon Music, Hungama, Spotify, Jio Saavn, Apple Music.(some apps may require subscription).
Voice control Alexa compatible smart appliances like lights, ACs, TVs, geysers. Extend the experience to non-smart appliances using smart plugs (to be purchased separately). Easily set up compatible Zigbee, Matter devices.
Automatically turn on light when you enter the room using in-built motion detection. Set these experiences using routines feature in Alexa app.
Manage your day better by just asking Alexa to set reminders, pay bills, read news and much more.
Use as a standalone speaker or pair your phone to use it as a Bluetooth speaker.
Echo 4th Gen comes with multiple privacy controls, including a mic off button.

item.g:title: Amazon Echo Pop| Smart speaker with Alexa and Bluetooth| Full sound, balanced bass, crisp vocals| Black
item.g:description:
Smartly styled smart speaker with Alexa.
Available in 4 exciting colors (Black, White, Green, Purple).
Loud sound, balanced bass, crisp vocals.
Play hands-free music from Amazon Music, Spotify, Jio Saavn, Apple Music. Just ask Alexa (some apps may require subscription).
Voice control smart lights, ACs, TVs, geysers. Make non-smart appliances smart using smart plugs (to be purchased separately).
Ask Alexa to play nursery rhymes, set alarms, reminders and much more.
Use as a standalone speaker or pair your phone to use as a Bluetooth speaker.
Built with multiple layers of privacy controls, including a mic off button.

item.g:title: Amazon Echo Pop| Smart speaker with Alexa and Bluetooth| Full sound, balanced bass, crisp vocals| Purple
item.g:description:
Smart speaker with loud sound, balanced bass, crisp vocals and Alexa.
Stylish design that blends into any decor.
Available in 4 exciting colors (Black, White, Green, Purple).
Play hands-free music from Amazon Music, Spotify, Jio Saavn, Apple Music. Just ask Alexa (some apps may require subscription).
Voice control smart lights, ACs, TVs, geysers. Extend the experience to non-smart appliances using smart plugs (to be purchased separately).
Ask Alexa to play nursery rhymes, set alarms, reminders and much more.
Use as a standalone speaker or pair your phone to use as a Bluetooth speaker.
Built with multiple layers of privacy controls, including a mic off button.

item.g:title: Amazon Echo Dot (5th Gen) | Smart speaker with vibrant sound, Motion Detection, Temperature Sensor, Alexa and Bluetooth| Blue
item.g:description:
5th (Latest) Generation Echo Dot with Alexa-The best sounding Echo Dot yet! With deeper bass and clearer vocals than all previous generations.
Just ask Alexa to play music from Amazon Music, Spotify, Jio Saavn, Apple Music.(some apps may require subscription)
Voice control Alexa compatible smart appliances like lights, ACs, TVs, geysers. Extend the experience to non-smart appliances using smart plugs (to be purchased separately)
Automatically turn on light when you enter the room or switch on the AC when it gets hot using in-built motion detection and temperature sensor. Set these experiences using routines feature in Alexa app.
Manage your day better by just asking Alexa to set reminders, pay bills, add items to shopping list and much more. Alexa can speak English and Hindi.
Pause/resume music, snooze alarms, dismiss timers with just a tap.
Use Echo Dot as a standalone speaker or pair your phone to use it as a Bluetooth speaker.
Echo Dot comes with multiple privacy controls, including a mic off button.

item.g:title: Amazon Basics 2 in 1 Bluetooth 5.0 Transmitter Receiver | 3.5mm Stereo Audio Adapter with Mic | Portable Design | Driverless Plug and Play | Easy Slide Switch Mode | 10m Range
item.g:description:
Driverless Design: Experience hassle-free setup with a driverless design, allowing you to simply plug and play for immediate use.
Dual Mode Functionality: Switch easily between Transmitter (TX) mode for sending audio from non-Bluetooth devices to Bluetooth headphones/speakers and Receiver (RX) mode for connecting wired speakers to Bluetooth-enabled devices.
Bluetooth 5.0 Technology: Utilize advanced Bluetooth 5.0 with a range of up to 10 meters (without obstacles), supporting A2DP and AVRCP(receiver mode only) for efficient and reliable audio streaming.
Built-in Microphone: Make and receive calls with ease using the built-in microphone, perfect for hands-free communication in your car.
Portable and Compact: Designed for portability, this compact Bluetooth adapter can easily slide into your pocket, making it an ideal audio companion on the go.
Universal Compatibility: Compatible with any device featuring a 3.5mm auxiliary input or FM radio, ensuring seamless integration with various audio systems without complex installations.
Technical Specifications: Bluetooth Range: Up to 10m (Without obstacle) Bluetooth Version: BT5.0, A2DP, AVRCP (receiver mode only) Pairing Name: AB-BTR-01 (Receiver mode)
Package Contents: 1 x BT 5.0 Audio Transmitter/Receiver Adapter, 1 x 3.5MM AUX Cable, 1 x User Manual

item.g:title: MICROWARE Bluetooth 5.0 Transmitter and Receiver, 2-in-1 Aux Wireless 3.5mm Adapter Wireless Audio Adapter for TV Audio Portable Wireless Receiver for Car/Home Stereo System
item.g:description:
★[Wireless Transmitter & Receiver 2in1] Receiver mode: Wirelessly streams audio from your Wireless-enabled phone, tablet, and computer to your wired stereo speakers, or headphones (Only support to be paired with one Wireless receiver). Transmitter mode: wirelessly streams audio from your non-Wireless TV, home stereo system, or CD player to your Wireless headphones or speakers.
★[33Feet Coverage & Permanent Work] With built-in antenna, 3.5mm aux Wireless transmitter for TV can reach up to 33ft coverage. You can lie on sofa watching movies or walk around listening music. The battery supports 10-hour service. Or work whilst charging and work permanently.
★[Energy Saving & Low Power Consumption] If Wireless V5.0 Transmitter/Receiver doesn't pair any device within 10 minutes, it will automatically shut down. No electrical energy is wasted, it also effectively protects the service life of the battery at the same time. Built-in 600mAh Battery ensures up to 8 hours working time, you can enjoy wireless free all day long.
【Broad Compatibility & Low Delay】This receiver transmitter adapter can be widely used in your computer, laptop, home stereo system, headset, smartphone, Mp3 player with the included 3.5mm cable and 3.5mm to 2RCA cable. , CD player, etc. Low latency for high-fidelity stereo sound, content transmission without delays in transmitter mode.
【ANC Noise Reduction & AEC Echo Cancellation】Support Noise Suppression and Echo Cancellation, offering you Magnificent Stereo Sound & Wonderful Sound Quality.

item.g:title: Sounce 2 in 1 Bluetooth 5.0 Transmitter Receiver | 3.5mm Stereo Audio Adapter with Mic | Portable Design | Driverless Plug and Play | Easy Slide Switch Mode | 50m Range | Compatible with Car, Aux
item.g:description:
🔊 Sounce 2-in-1 Bluetooth 5.0 Transmitter & Receiver – Upgrade your audio experience with seamless wireless connectivity for car stereos, AUX devices, and more!
🎤 Built-in Mic & Plug-and-Play – Enjoy hands-free calls and instant pairing with a driverless, easy-to-use design.
🔄 Dual Mode: Transmitter & Receiver – Effortlessly switch between TX & RX modes with a simple slide switch.
📶 Ultra-Long 50m Range – Experience stable, high-quality audio transmission with an extended Bluetooth range.
🎧 Universal Compatibility – Works with car audio systems, speakers, headphones, TVs, and other 3.5mm AUX devices.

item.g:title: Universal Car Bluetooth X8 FM Transmitter – Hands-Free Calling, Stereo Music Player, TF Card & AUX Support, Dual USB Mobile Charging, Car Kit Receiver Compatible with All Smartphones (Black)
item.g:description:
Universal Car Compatibility: Works with all cars, SUVs, trucks, and any 12V/24V power socket. Connects instantly to your car stereo through FM transmission.
Multiple Music Input Options: Supports TF card, USB flash drive, AUX cable, and Bluetooth playback, giving you complete freedom to choose your audio source.
Dual USB Charging Ports: Charge two devices at the same time with stable, fast output—ideal for smartphones, tablets, and accessories.
Wireless Music Streaming: Connect your phone via Bluetooth and enjoy high-quality stereo audio directly on your car speakers—perfect for music, podcasts, or navigation.
Clear Hands-Free Calls: Equipped with advanced noise-cancellation and a high-sensitivity microphone for smooth, distortion-free phone calls while driving.

item.g:title: Apple EarPods (USB-C) ​​​​​​​
item.g:description: Designed by Apple

item.g:title: Apple AirPods 4 Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth Headphones, Personalised Spatial Audio, Sweat and Water Resistant, USB-C Charging Case, H2 Chip, Up to 30 Hours of Battery Life, Effortless Setup for iPhone
item.g:description:
REBUILT FOR COMFORT — AirPods 4 have been redesigned for exceptional all-day comfort and greater stability. With a refined contour, shorter stem and quick-press controls for music or calls.
PERSONALISED SPATIAL AUDIO — Personalised Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking places sound all around you, creating a theatre-like listening experience for music, TV shows, movies, games and more.
IMPROVED SOUND AND CALL QUALITY — AirPods 4 feature the Apple-designed H2 chip. Voice Isolation improves the quality of phone calls in loud conditions. Using advanced computational audio, it reduces background noise while isolating and clarifying the sound of your voice for whoever you’re speaking to.
MAGICAL EXPERIENCE — Just say “Hey Siri” to play a song, make a call or check your schedule. And with Siri Interactions, now you can respond to Siri by simply nodding your head yes or shaking your head no. Pair AirPods 4 by simply placing them near your device and tapping Connect on your screen.
LONG BATTERY LIFE — Get up to 5 hours of listening time on a single charge. And get up to 30 hours of total listening time using the case.
REDESIGNED CASE — The Charging Case comes with USB-C charging capabilities and is more than 10% smaller by volume than the previous generation.*
DUST, SWEAT AND WATER RESISTANT — AirPods 4 and the charging case are rated IP54 dust, sweat and water resistant, so they’ll withstand rain and heavy workouts.*

item.g:title: Apple AirPods Pro 3 Wireless Earbuds, Active Noise Cancellation, Live Translation, Heart Rate Sensing, Bluetooth Headphones, Spatial Audio, High-Fidelity Sound, USB-C Charging
item.g:description:
WORLD’S BEST IN-EAR ACTIVE NOISE CANCELLATION — Removes up to 2x more unwanted noise than AirPods Pro 2 so you can stay fully immersed in the moment.
BREAKTHROUGH AUDIO PERFORMANCE — Experience breathtaking, three-dimensional audio with AirPods Pro 3. A new acoustic architecture delivers transformed bass, detailed clarity so you can hear every instrument and stunningly vivid vocals.
HEART RATE SENSING — Built-in heart rate sensing lets you track your heart rate and calories burned for up to 50 different workout types. With iPhone, you will have access to the Move ring, step count and the new Workout Buddy, powered by Apple Intelligence.
LIVE TRANSLATION — Communicate across language barriers using Live Translation, enabled by Apple Intelligence.
EXTENDED BATTERY LIFE — Get up to 8 hours of listening time with Active Noise Cancellation on a single charge.

item.g:title: Apple EarPods with 3.5mm Headphone Plug
item.g:description:
Unlike traditional, circular earbuds, the design of the EarPods is defined by the geometry of the ear. Which makes them more comfortable for more people than any other earbud-style headphones.
The speakers inside the EarPods have been engineered to maximize sound output and minimize sound loss, which means you get high-quality audio.
The EarPods also include a built-in remote that lets you adjust the volume, control the playback of music and video, and answer or end calls with a pinch of the cord.
Warranty Description: 1 Year Warranty

item.g:title: Apple AirPods 4 Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth Headphones, with Active Noise Cancellation, Adaptive Audio, Transparency Mode, Personalised Spatial Audio, USB-C Charging Case, Wireless Charging, H2 Chip
item.g:description:
ULTIMATE OVER-EAR LISTENING EXPERIENCE — Apple-designed dynamic driver provides high-fidelity audio. Computational audio combines custom acoustic design with the Apple H1 chip and software for breakthrough listening experiences.
FIVE FRESH COLOURS — AirPods Max come in five fresh colours: Midnight, Starlight, Blue, Purple and Orange. A colour-matched Smart Case is also included.
FOCUS ON WHAT’S PLAYING — Pro-level Active Noise Cancellation removes up to 2x more background noise, so you can immerse yourself in music.
HEAR THE WORLD AROUND YOU — Transparency mode lets you comfortably hear and interact with the world around you.
PERSONALISED SPATIAL AUDIO — With sound that suits your unique ear shape along with dynamic head tracking, AirPods Max deliver an immersive listening experience that places sound all around you. You can also listen to selected songs, shows and movies in Dolby Atmos.
PERSONALISED SPATIAL AUDIO — Personalised Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking places sound all around you, creating a theatre-like listening experience for music, TV shows, movies, games and more.*
REDESIGNED CASE — The Charging Case is the smallest in the industry with wireless charging. Charge with an Apple Watch Charger, USB-C Charge Cable or Qi-certified charger.*
LONG BATTERY LIFE — With Active Noise Cancellation enabled, get up to 4 hours of listening time on a single charge and up to 20 hours using the case. And you can get up to 30 hours of total listening time without ANC enabled.*
DUST, SWEAT AND WATER RESISTANT — AirPods 4 and the charging case are rated IP54 dust, sweat and water resistant, so they’ll withstand rain and heavy workouts.*
